highlights: Significant advancements in agentic AI systems are focusing on self-correction, memory, and robust runtime governance, promising more autonomous and reliable AI applications for builders.

New model releases and foundational research are driving efficiency, specialized capabilities like multilingual search and medical AI, and exploring unified neural network architectures to push performance boundaries.
Major AI companies are intensifying enterprise AI adoption through new tools, strategic partnerships, comprehensive safety benchmarks, and expanded learning opportunities to empower the workforce.

agents.title: Perplexity Launches Brain: A Self-Improving Memory System for Agents
agents.summary: Perplexity's new 'Brain' system provides a self-improving memory for its Computer agent, building a context graph of work and learning overnight to significantly enhance correctness, recall, and cost efficiency.

agents.title: NVIDIA AI Introduce SpatialClaw: Training-Free Agent for Spatial Reasoning
agents.summary: SpatialClaw is a novel training-free agent that leverages code as its action interface for 3D spatial reasoning, writing Python in a persistent kernel to compose perception tools without explicit training.

agents.title: Deontic Policies for Runtime Governance of Agentic AI Systems (AgenticRei)
agents.summary: This research introduces AgenticRei, a deontic policy framework for runtime governance of LLM-driven agents, addressing complex security, privacy, and compliance challenges by managing obligations, dispensations, and policy conflicts.

models.title: OpenAI Releases LifeSciBench: 750-Task Benchmark for Life-Science AI
models.summary: OpenAI's LifeSciBench is an expert-authored, 750-task benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate AI models on real-world life-science research, grading reasoning and decision-making capabilities beyond simple recall across seven biological domains.

models.title: ITNet: A Learnable Integral Transform Unifying Neural Network Architectures
models.summary: The Integral Transform Network (ITNet) introduces a unified architecture with a learnable integral kernel that can recover the behaviors of convolution, self-attention, and autoregressive recurrence, matching specialized baselines across various modalities.

models.title: Liquid AI Introduces LFM2.5-Embedding-350M and LFM2.5-ColBERT-350M for Multilingual Search
models.summary: Liquid AI has released LFM2.5 Retrievers, combining a dense bi-encoder and ColBERT late-interaction model, optimized for fast and efficient multilingual search across 11 languages, particularly on edge devices.

tools.title: Yandex Open-Sources YaFF: Zero-Copy Wire Format for Protobuf
tools.summary: Yandex has open-sourced YaFF, a zero-copy wire format for the Protobuf ecosystem, enabling near-struct read speeds and reporting 10–20% CPU savings at production scale for high-performance applications.

tools.title: The Open Source Community is Backing OpenEnv for Agentic RL
tools.summary: OpenEnv is gaining significant open-source community support as a framework dedicated to developing and deploying agentic Reinforcement Learning systems, facilitating advanced RL research and applications.

tools.title: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Enterprise AI
tools.summary: NVIDIA's Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety offers customizable multimodal safety features, providing critical capabilities for global enterprises to ensure secure and compliant deployment of AI applications.

companies.title: OpenAI to Acquire Ona for Codex Expansion and Agentic Workflows
companies.summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand its Codex capabilities, aiming to provide secure, persistent cloud environments that enable the development and deployment of long-running AI agents across diverse enterprise workflows.

companies.title: OpenAI Launches Partner Network with $150M Investment to Accelerate Enterprise AI
companies.summary: OpenAI has introduced a new Partner Network, backed by a $150 million investment, designed to empower global partners in accelerating enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and digital transformation.

companies.title: OpenAI Enhances ChatGPT Enterprise with New Usage Analytics and Spend Controls
companies.summary: OpenAI has released new usage analytics and updated spend controls for ChatGPT Enterprise, providing organizations with better tools to manage costs, monitor AI usage, and scale their AI solutions with confidence.

learning.title: New OpenAI Academy Courses for Building Practical AI Skills and Agents
learning.summary: OpenAI has launched three new Academy courses aimed at helping individuals acquire practical AI skills, establish repeatable workflows, and effectively apply AI agents in their daily professional tasks.

learning.title: Tutorial: Build a Forecasting Pipeline with TimeCopilot and Foundation Models
learning.summary: This guide demonstrates how to construct an end-to-end forecasting workflow using TimeCopilot, leveraging foundation models and automated anomaly detection to generate probabilistic forecasts and visualize future trends.

learning.title: Salesforce CodeGen Tutorial: Generate, Validate, and Rerank Python Functions
learning.summary: A comprehensive tutorial on implementing an end-to-end workflow for Salesforce CodeGen, covering function extraction, syntax/safety checks, unit-test validation, multi-turn program synthesis, and reranking best-of-N candidates.
